allow: Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "import cv2, PIL, paddle, paddleocr, torch, torchvision, transformers, streamlit, pandas, rapidfuzz, requests, editdistance; print\(''All imports OK''\)")
Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -m pip install torch==2.10.0 torchvision==0.25.0 --index-url https://download.pytorch.org/whl/cu126)

Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "import cv2, PIL, paddle, paddleocr, torch, torchvision, transformers, streamlit, pandas, rapidfuzz, requests, editdistance; print\(''All imports OK''\); print\(f''torch {torch.__version__}, CUDA: {torch.cuda.is_available\(\)}''\)")

Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "import torch; import cv2, PIL, paddle, paddleocr, torchvision, transformers, streamlit, pandas, rapidfuzz, requests, editdistance; print\(''All imports OK''\); print\(f''torch {torch.__version__}, CUDA: {torch.cuda.is_available\(\)}''\)")
